overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game, moving through a futuristic indoor commercial plaza with neon lighting, digital billboards, and palm trees. The player character walks through corridors and open areas with vending machines, encountering NPCs and bodies on the ground suggesting recent combat.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view moving through a futuristic indoor corridor with palm trees and digital advertising. The player approaches and ascends a wide staircase, transitioning from the enclosed walkway toward an open plaza area above.

segments.scene_description: Entering the open plaza, the scene reveals a combat aftermath with bodies scattered on the ground. Two NPCs stand near a green planter counter, one armed with a rifle. The environment features neon lighting, digital billboards, and vending machines in the background.

segments.scene_description: Moving through the commercial walkway, the camera passes purple and green vending machines with a person interacting with one. The area shows signs of disorder with trash and bodies on the ground, while large digital billboards display advertisements on the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial plaza exit with digital kiosks and archway

turning right around digital advertising kiosk

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the plaza exit through a large archway structure. Digital kiosks and billboards line the path, with two NPCs standing near a large advertisement. The environment transitions from fully enclosed to partially open as it nears the exterior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a confined futuristic corridor into a sprawling, chaotic commercial plaza. It begins by navigating an enclosed walkway lined with palm trees and digital advertising before ascending a wide staircase that opens into a larger upper level. As the camera enters the plaza, the environment shifts to a scene of combat aftermath with bodies scattered across the floor and armed NPCs standing guard near green planters under the glow of neon billboards. The movement then continues through a commercial walkway past purple and green vending machines and discarded trash, while large digital displays dominate the surrounding walls. Finally, the path leads toward a large archway exit, passing digital kiosks and remaining NPCs as the space transitions from a fully enclosed interior toward the exterior.
